evidence.quote: A previous chemistry-based functional proteomic screen identified active ubiquitin-specific proteases (USP) in EBV-infected cells [9]. USP5/IsoT, USP7/HAUSP, USP9, and USP15i are higher expressed in EBV-transformed lymphoblastoid cell line (LCL) than in the Burkitt's lymphoma cell line Raji [9].
9. Ovaa, H., ... Proc. Natl. Acad. Sci. USA 2004, 101, 2253–2258.

Using affinity chromatography in vitro and tandem affinity purification (TAP)-tagging in vivo approaches, the EBV nuclear antigen 1 (EBNA1) was identified to be associated with several cellular proteins, such as USP7/HAUSP, CK2, PRMT5 [10].

Using affinity chromatography in vitro and tandem affinity purification (TAP)-tagging in vivo approaches, the EBV nuclear antigen 1 (EBNA1) was identified to be associated with several cellular proteins, such as USP7/HAUSP, CK2, PRMT5 [10].
A screen using co-immunoprecipitation coupled with mass spectrometry (IP-MS) showed that LMP1 can interact with 19 E3 ligases, including CHIP and TRAFD1 [55].

step_scores.label: mostly_supported

evidence.quote: Bortezomib suppressed the growth of EBV-positive Burkitt's lymphoma in a murine xenograft model. Moreover, the tumor growth was almost completely halted after treatment with Bortezomib followed by the nucleoside analogue [131I]PHAU [103,104].
103. Fu, D.X., ... Clin. Cancer Res. 2007... 104. Fu, D.X., ... Nat. Med. 2008.

issues.reason: Text specifies 'followed by' (sequential), while step parameter says 'combination' which can imply concurrent administration. Minor semantic deviation.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Change parameter 'combination' to 'sequential treatment' or 'followed by' to match text.

evidence.quote: A high throughput screening of small molecule compounds identified five tetrahydrocarboline derivatives that effectively reactivated the lytic cycle... Among these compounds, C60 consistently stimulated EBV lytic reactivation... [120].

issues.reason: Text describes screening for biological reactivation ('effectively reactivated the lytic cycle'), which implies wet laboratory assays (cell-based), not dry (computational) experiments. Classifying as 'dry_experiment' is factually inconsistent with the nature of the assay described.

evidence.quote: A following biochemical affinity purification assay showed that C60 can directly target the Cullin exchange factor CAND1 [121].
